author: doll-agent
content: Root cause: PAIRWISE_BASE=256 made sum(1M) run 4096 base chunks each with its own horizontal reduction. Fix: PAIRWISE_BASE 256 -> 4096 (ferray-stats/src/parallel.rs), cuts horizontal-sum overhead 16x. Per-chunk error ~12 ULP (well below f64 mantissa). Speed: sum 100K 1.2x slower -> 1.36x faster; sum 1M 1.6x slower -> 1.05x slower (DRAM ceiling); mean 100K 1.2x slower -> 1.44x faster; var/std 1M 2.3x -> 2.96x/2.69x faster. 230+18+13 tests pass, clippy clean, stat-equiv 47/47 PASS.
